# Copilot Instructions

## 项目指南
- User prefers code to stay clean, clear, non-redundant, and avoid bloated or messy implementations.
- All user interface text in the project should use RESW multilingual resources instead of hardcoded strings; implementations should remain clean and minimal, avoiding bloat.
- Crash log settings page should adopt a minimalist, user-centric expression: display "Last Crash Time/Not Crashed," avoiding explanatory fluff. The crash log directory should use the more conventional `Logs` path instead of an additional `Logs/Crash` subdirectory.
